stand.notes: Source version: live R1 guide (unversioned) and unitree_sdk2@21d0a3b. Checked 2026-07-18 by official-guide and pinned-source inspection. The guide documents StandUp and FSM ID 4 as locked standing, but the high-level service is unavailable in debug mode; delivered transition, posture, firmware, permission, and safety evidence are absent.

move_velocity.notes: Source version: live R1 guide (unversioned) and unitree_sdk2@21d0a3b. Checked 2026-07-18 by official-guide and pinned-source inspection. Move/SetVelocity and FSM ID 811 are documented, but velocity units, clipping limits, debug/controller state, delivered support, behavior, and approved motion test evidence are absent.

stop.notes: Source version: live R1 guide (unversioned) and unitree_sdk2@21d0a3b. Checked 2026-07-18 by official-guide and pinned-source inspection. StopMove only sets commanded velocity to zero; stopping behavior, failure response, balance, and the physical E-Stop chain were not verified.

camera.notes: Source version: live product/developer pages, unversioned. Checked 2026-07-18 by product inspection and operator-transcribed official guide. The guide documents WebRTC as the main App video path and reports GST unsupported by the current software version; exact version, delivered WebRTC developer access, encoding, calibration, timestamps, and permission remain unknown.

audio_input.notes: Source version: live product/developer pages (unversioned) and unitree_sdk2@21d0a3b. Checked 2026-07-18 by official-page/local-source inspection. The guide names audio in the App WebRTC path, but direction and developer access are unclear; example constants are 16 kHz mono signed 16-bit PCM, while delivered format, timing, permission, and privacy procedure remain unverified.

audio_output.notes: Source version: live product page (unversioned) and unitree_sdk2@21d0a3b. Checked 2026-07-18 by product/local-source inspection. No playback or sound output was run; delivered availability and approval are unknown.

depth_camera.notes: Source version: live product/developer pages, unversioned. Checked 2026-07-18 by product/architecture inspection. A binocular camera label and lidar point clouds over WebRTC are not evidence of a depth-camera stream or API.

navigation.notes: Source version: live R1 guide (unversioned) and unitree_sdk2@21d0a3b. Checked 2026-07-18 by official-guide and pinned-source inspection. The guide lists a unitree_slam service name, but a label or running service does not prove functional navigation; no delivered ServiceList response, navigation API, sensor validation, behavior test, or safety evidence is available.

obstacle_avoidance.notes: Source version: Week 01 baseline at 2026-07-15. Checked 2026-07-18 by source inventory. Sensor, algorithm, behavior, and delivered safety response are unknown.

ros2.notes: Source version: live R1 guide (unversioned) and unitree_sdk2@21d0a3b. Checked 2026-07-18 by operator-transcribed official guide and local source-boundary review. The guide documents DDS IDL compatibility and ROS 2 interface use for EDU with a suitable RMW; delivered EDU status, RMW, ROS 2 distribution, PC1 permission, and test evidence are absent.

sit.notes: Source version: unitree_sdk2@21d0a3b. Checked 2026-07-18 by local header inventory. Sit is commented out in the header/example; that is neither support evidence nor proof of delivered unavailability.
